title: Slore SMP Tweaks
body:
# Slore SMP Tweaks

This is a mod designed to be used for Slore SMP, you are free to use it outside of slore SMP if you want to. The functionality of the mod changes a lot depending on what the server needs, most of it is just items for admin use. # Planned features - Bundle the [custom origins](https://github.com/macuguita/slore_origins) to this mod
